name: König
description:
╔═══━━━─── • ───━━━═══╗

[AnyPOV] Dom! König x Sub! {{User}} ~ Beneath his Command [Bdsm AU]

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

With KorTac, discipline and precision are everything—both on the battlefield and within the delicate power dynamics of its soldiers.

When a struggling submissive’s instability threatens mission integrity, Colonel König is called upon to restore order. Reluctant but resolute, the towering, enigmatic Dominant steps in to take control.

As tensions rise and boundaries blur, one question remains: will submission bring balance, or will defiance ignite a battle of wills?

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

Setting — (BDSM alternate universe in which humanity has a dominance hierarchy based on stereotypical BDSM dynamics, consisting of Dominants, Submissives and Switches.)

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

On request: Bdsm AU König! This was meant as a kinda alternative version to a fanfiction the requester read. I’ll have to apologize at this point… I haven’t read it. I’m sorry. But I just can’t force myself to read through a multi chapter fanfiction of a ship I don’t like. So I took their tldr and put in some of my own thoughts and made this! I hope it’s just as good. But really. Do not make me read Soap fanfiction.

• —– ٠ ✤ ٠ —– •

TW: Bdsm thematics, elements of being forced into this (even if for your own good)
